recommendations.title: Dream 9 Toriko x One Piece x Dragon Ball Z Super Collaboration Special!!
recommendations.overview: A two-part crossover special featuring characters from Dragon Ball Z, One Piece and Toriko.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Bardock - The Father of Goku
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Science Fiction, Drama, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Bardock, Son Goku's father, is a low-ranking Saiyan soldier who was given the power to see into the future by the last remaining alien on a planet he just destroyed. He witnesses the destruction of his race and must now do his best to stop Frieza's i

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Cooler's Revenge
recommendations.overview: After defeating Frieza, Goku returns to Earth and goes on a camping trip with Gohan and Krillin. Everything is normal until Cooler - Frieza's brother - sends three henchmen after Goku. A long fight ensues between our heroes and Cooler, in which he tr

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
recommendations.overview: The Red Ribbon Army, an evil organization that was once destroyed by Goku in the past, has been reformed by a group of people who have created new and mightier Androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, and seek vengeance against Goku and his family.

recommendations.title: Akira
recommendations.overview: A secret military project endangers Neo-Tokyo when it turns a biker gang member into a rampaging psychic psychopath that only two teenagers and a group of psychics can stop.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Broly
recommendations.overview: Earth is peaceful following the Tournament of Power. Realizing that the universes still hold many more strong people yet to see, Goku spends all his days training to reach even greater heights. Then one day, Goku and Vegeta are faced by a Saiyan call

recommendations.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
recommendations.overview: Powered with incredible speed, Sonic The Hedgehog embraces his new home on Earth. That is, until Sonic sparks the attention of super-uncool evil genius Dr. Robotnik. Now it’s super-villain vs. super-sonic in an all-out race across the globe to stop R

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Resurrection 'F'
recommendations.overview: One peaceful day on Earth, two remnants of Frieza's army named Sorbet and Tagoma arrive searching for the Dragon Balls with the aim of reviving Frieza. They succeed, and Frieza subsequently seeks revenge on the Saiyans.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: The Return of Cooler
recommendations.overview: Cooler has resurrected himself as a robot and is enslaving the people of New Namek. Goku and the gang must help.
